_comment: Example config for worker.ps1. Copy to config.json in your ConfigDir and replace placeholder values. NEVER commit a populated config.json (it carries the service principal secret).
_aksEdgeMsiUrlNote: Official Microsoft aka.ms shortcut for the AKS Edge Essentials K3s MSI. Always points at the latest stable (currently 1.12.269.0 / K3s 1.33.5). Microsoft does NOT publish stable per-version aka.ms links; version paths that appear in GitHub release notes (e.g. AksEdge-K3s-x.y.z.msi) are NOT real download URLs and will return an HTML error page. If you need pinning, host the MSI yourself.
_spNote: Service principal used by AKS Edge Essentials to create the cluster (required by the install step). Needs Kubernetes Cluster - Azure Arc Onboarding (or broader Contributor) on the resource group. Leave both fields empty only when this config is used to drive the worker against an already-existing cluster, in which case Phase 3's Arc operations fall through to the machine's managed identity.
_enableWorkloadIdentityNote: Default false matches the validated AIO baseline. Set true when downstream AIO components need workload-identity-backed secret sync. Activates Phase 3 OIDC issuer enablement, K3s apiserver patch, and Arc agent restart.
_scheduledTaskNameNote: Optional. Defaults to SiteOpsAksEeBootstrap when omitted. Set explicitly if you run multiple bootstraps in parallel on the same host (unusual).
_localAdminUserNote: Optional. Defaults to siteops-bootstrap when omitted. The launcher creates this user with an on-box-generated password and registers the Scheduled Task to run as it. Phase 99 removes the user after task unregister.
